command:
TOKEN=$(cat /root/.git-credentials 2>/dev/null | grep -o '//[^:]*:[^@]*@' | sed 's|//||;s|@||;s|.*:||' | head -1) && curl -s -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" 'https://api.github.com/repos/motitap-dotcom/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/actions/runs?per_page=3&branch=claude/claude-md-mm3qa8i9848jcovk-X3DTU' | python3 << 'PYEOF'
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
for r in d.get('workflow_runs', []):
    print(f"#{r['run_number']} id={r['id']} {r['status']}/{r.get('conclusion','?')} {r['name']} at {r['created_at']}")
PYEOF
